meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Solving Basic App Roadblocks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop hitting walls with basic apps. Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To break through basic app roadblocks, stop manual debugging and pivot to AI-assisted diagnostics. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based refactoring, you can identify logic gaps in seconds, automate edge-case handling, and ship production-ready code while maintaining high-velocity project timelines.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is expecting a demo by EOD, but your app is throwing a cryptic error that makes no sense. You’ve spent three hours chasing a ghost in the stack trace, and that 'simple' feature has turned into a project-killing bottleneck. We have all been there—stuck in the weeds of basic implementation, losing both money and momentum.

But the era of manual debugging is dead. Professional developers today don't just write code; they orchestrate AI systems to find, diagnose, and repair it. By shifting your workflow to include intelligent agents, you transform from a frustrated coder into a high-leverage architect. Let’s turn that frustration into a finished product.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Context
steps.description: Before debugging, you must feed the AI your current state. Antigravity excels at mapping your existing codebase structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory. Identify the primary logic flow and highlight any potential circular dependencies or common anti-patterns in the current implementation.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use AI to ingest your error logs and map them against your code to find the exact line causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I have an error log [Insert Log]. Map this stack trace to the code and pinpoint the exact function and variable state causing the failure.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Instead of patching, use Claude Code to suggest a cleaner, more robust implementation of the failing module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactored version of the identified module that adheres to SOLID principles and includes defensive error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --prompt 'Refactor the identified module for better error resilience'

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Ensure the fix holds up by letting the AI write and run tests against the new code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for the refactored module covering edge cases and potential null pointer exceptions.

steps.title: Final Integration and Verification
steps.description: Perform a final scan to ensure the fix hasn't introduced regressions elsewhere in the app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a holistic impact analysis on the recent changes. Are there any downstream effects on the API endpoints?
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit -m 'Fixed critical module crash with AI-assisted refactoring'

pro_tips: Always use the '--focus' flag in Claude Code to prevent the AI from hallucinating based on irrelevant files.
When debugging, provide the AI with your 'package.json' or 'requirements.txt' first to ensure it understands your dependency environment.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'technical briefs'—state the goal, the constraints, and the desired output format clearly.
Use AI to generate documentation for your fixes immediately; it keeps your project professional and client-ready.
If an error persists, ask the AI to 'explain the logic as a senior lead dev'—this often reveals a fundamental flaw in your approach rather than a syntax error.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is stabilized, apply this same workflow to your deployment pipeline to automate your CI/CD checks.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop debugging in the dark and start building with precision. Don't let a simple error stall your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
